# Website Command Center v37

This release completes the public website navigation layer without removing prior pages. It adds:

- a new Command Center route
- guided journeys for first-time users, reviewers, builders, operators, and complete-tour visitors
- a categorized page atlas
- a global JavaScript-enhanced drawer that preserves legacy links while reducing visual clutter
- a local NavigationReceipt export
- build-time injection of the navigation layer into published HTML

The page remains public-safe: no accounts, no forms, no cookies, no analytics, no wallet connection, no storage, no token route, and no production authority.
